tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
I'd never met you, but I wanted[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]
To invite you to the party[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm[/ch]
Then you walked in with those green eyes[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]
Never stolen by nobody[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
And they flicker to the future[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]
For a moment, I could picture[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bm[/ch]
Then you touch me, and I come back[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
And we're talking on the staircase[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
'Bout your big dreams on the big screens[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]                                 [ch]Bm[/ch]
Out of Georgia, now you're lonely in this city[/tab]

Layin' with me
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]
And you're scared it's moving quickly[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]
Oh, now you're crying, you're in pieces[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em[/ch]                             [ch]Bm[/ch]
'Cause the only love you've ever known is Jesus[/tab]

I can feel it
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]
Oh, I hate that I'm the reason that you're[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
In your head right now[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
While your whole world is spinning out[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]
So, slow it down[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]
Take a moment now[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bm[/ch]
We're too young to drown[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Deep in dirty waters[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
Full of hopeless doubt[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]
Let me pull you out[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bm[/ch]
Let me hold you now[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]
Let me slow it down[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
Ain't it funny how it changes[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]
How the future rearranges?[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bm[/ch]
I get nervous or I'm anxious[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]
Maybe loving you is dangerous[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
I could lose you like the others[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]                             [ch]Bm[/ch]
The only girl that never left me is my mother[/tab]

Oh, I love her
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]
And I know you'll probably hate it, but I'm[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
In my head right now[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]
So, slow it down[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]
Take a moment now[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bm[/ch]
We're too young to drown[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Deep in dirty waters[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
Full of hopeless doubt[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]
Let me pull you out[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bm[/ch]
Let me hold you now[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]
Let me[/tab]


[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Slow it down[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]                        [ch]Bm[/ch]
When you're on the ground and you're crying[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
I'm trying[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]
To slow it down[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]                     [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
When you're spinning round in your head[/tab]


[tab][Outro]
[ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Ooh-ooh-ooh, ooh-ooh[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
I'll help you slow it down[/tab]
